{{Quote|Padmé's head of security, Captain Typho, believes that going to Ilum is too dangerous. He tries to convince Yoda not to go, but the ancient Jedi Master is committed to rescuing Luminara Unduli and Barris Offee. Once the ship lands on Ilum, Yoda sets out in the snow, alone. To enter the sacred cave, he must first defeat a battalion of droids.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/15.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Fifteen (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 15'''" is the fifteenth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, the fifth episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]], and the fifteenth episode in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[April 1]], [[2004]].

==Plot summary==
The episode begins with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]] protesting against [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] plea to save the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]], saying it will interfere with the mission they are currently on. Yoda then uses a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on Typho, manipulating him to say it will be a slight detour and that it will not jeopardize the mission. None of the others (C-3PO and R2-D2) realize what is happening, except [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. Amidala then tells Yoda that she will no longer need any of her captain's further 'persuasion', and proceeds to order the [[H-type Nubian yacht/Legends|Naboo Yacht]] to Ilum. However, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] still objects, saying that since Ilum is on the other side of [[Ilum system/Legends|the system]], it will not be the slight detour that Yoda claims it to be, but he has no choice.

Once there, Yoda orders Amidala to stay safe, calming her down by saying he will call her if he needs assistance, and then heads out to the [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] [[Crystal Cave/Legends|caves]]. He fights several [[Spelunker probe droid/Legends|chameleon droids]], but manages to finally reach the two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] inside.
